MODULE_COMBAT_DESC: 戰鬥系統模組 — 管理資源池、敵人追蹤與戰鬥敘事
RESOURCE_HP_REGEN_DESC: 休息、睡眠、治療物品或戰鬥結束時恢復
RESOURCE_SP_REGEN_DESC: 休息或恢復物品時恢復
COMBAT_UA_COMBAT_CONTEXT_DESC: Brief description of the combat scenario and tactical situation.
CONFIG_BASE_DIFFICULTY_DESC: Base difficulty class for combat test rolls.
CONFIG_SURROUNDED_THRESHOLD_DESC: Minimum enemy count to trigger the surrounded flag.
CONFIG_SURROUNDED_ADVANTAGE_DESC: Minimum number advantage enemies need over player team for surrounded flag.
CONFIG_BOSS_HP_MULT_DESC: Multiplier applied to boss enemy HP values.
COMBAT_PACING_NPC_INITIATIVE: 戰鬥中角色展現獨特戰鬥風格或即興戰術配合，影響戰局走向
COMBAT_PACING_ENVIRONMENTAL: 戰場環境變化（地形崩塌、火勢蔓延、增援出現）迫使重新部署
COMBAT_PACING_OPPORTUNITY: 戰鬥中出現逆轉機會（敵人露出破綻、發現弱點、獲得增援）
